Interface ShelterRepository

All Known Implementing Classes:
CsvShelterRepository
public interface ShelterRepository
Defines persistence operations for Shelter records. Implementations are responsible for reading and writing shelter data to the underlying store, without exposing any storage details to the service layer.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    delete(String id)
    Removes the shelter record with the given ID from the store.
    List<Shelter>
    findAll()
    Returns all shelters currently persisted in the store.
    Optional<Shelter>
    findById(String id)
    Returns the shelter with the given ID, or an empty optional if not found.
    void
    save(Shelter shelter)
    Persists a new shelter or overwrites the existing record with the same ID.

  • Method Details

    • save

      void save(Shelter shelter)
      Persists a new shelter or overwrites the existing record with the same ID. Callers are responsible for ensuring the shelter is fully constructed before saving.
      Parameters:
      shelter - the shelter to save; must not be null

    • findById

      Optional<Shelter> findById(String id)
      Returns the shelter with the given ID, or an empty optional if not found. Does not throw if the ID is absent — callers decide how to handle the missing case.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier to look up; must not be null or blank
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the shelter, or empty if not found

    • findAll

      List<Shelter> findAll()
      Returns all shelters currently persisted in the store. Returns an empty list if no shelters have been saved.
      Returns:
      a list of all shelters

    • delete

      void delete(String id)
      Removes the shelter record with the given ID from the store. Does nothing if no shelter with that ID exists.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the shelter to delete; must not be null or blank
